name: KATT-AMR
note: Off-Meta MW2 Anti-Materiel Sniper (.50 Cal, 33 RPM, 5-round, Bolt). Universelle Slots = MW-Pool.

AMMUNITION: .50 Cal High Grain Rounds :: +15% Range | +15% Bullet Velocity | +5% Gun Kick | +8% Horiz. Recoil | +8% Vert. Recoil
.50 Cal Low Grain Rounds :: -15% Range | -15% Bullet Velocity | -5% Gun Kick | -8% Horiz. Recoil | -8% Vert. Recoil
.50 Cal Mono :: -1.3% Range | +8% Bullet Velocity | +3% Gun Kick | +4% Horiz. Recoil | +4% Vert. Recoil
.50 Cal Spire Point Rounds :: +5.4% Range | +15% Bullet Velocity
.50 Cal High Velocity :: -5.1% Range | +20% Bullet Velocity
BARREL: Tempus Aura Heavy Long Barrel :: -8% Gun Kick | -13% Horiz. Recoil | -13% Vert. Recoil | -5% Move | -3% Sprint | +10% Sprint to Fire
Perdition 24" Short Barrel :: -9% Range | -5% Bullet Velocity | +2% Horiz. Recoil | +2% Vert. Recoil | +3% Move | +3% Crouch | -3% ADS Time | -12% Sprint to Fire
Zang-34 Barrel :: +25% Range | +10% Bullet Velocity | +10% Sprint to Fire
BOLT: Requiem-9 Heavy Bolt :: +3% Fire Rate | -14% Idle Sway
CONVERSION KIT: JAK Salvo :: -68% Bullet Velocity | -50% Gun Kick | -50% Horiz. Recoil | -50% Vert. Recoil | -15% ADS Time
MAGAZINE: 7 Round Mag :: -3% Move | -3% Crouch | -1% Sprint | -4% ADS Move | +2% ADS Time | +9% Reload
